title: Separate Roads Ahead
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on separate roads ahead within the Leaving Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let me go as well! I've been with the crew since they got here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Me too! As Dr. Chopper's assistant!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Hey, we fought with Luffy! Mr. Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Nami likes sleeping on my stomach!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: What the hell does that have to do with anything, father Yomo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I want to chew on Baron corpse's Bones forever!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I see through all your ulterior motives! Silence, dog clan!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: I understand how you all feel but I will be leaving this to Pedro's discretion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And you are the only person that can keep him in line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I made use of the growth capabilities of the pop green,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The surface treat-ments were done with frankly's help.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Will you let me finish my explanation, Nami?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Um, usopp, don't you think it's a bit long?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well if you'd have let me finish... you extended it too much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's gonna take a while before you get the hang of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: By applying differ- ent amounts of strength to the handle, you can freely control the length of both halves.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As for the weatherian devices you gave me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I managed to put almost all of them in there, save for one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The magic wand you told me about on Sabaody... I couldn't really wrap my head around it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's easy to hold and even easier to twirl!()

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's wonderful() it really is the culmination of all of weatheria's weather science!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The sorcery Clima fact I've always dreamed of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now then, the fee for the materials used...

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: My name is Pedro. I won't get in your way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you, Wanda! I will! You too!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: WH... why are you here, Brother Pedro?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I will be tagging along as someone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What is that supposed to mean, GAOH?!

summary: Separate Roads Ahead: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
